case_title: CURTIS, MICHAEL J. VS BLOCKEY, JOHN E. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CURTIS, MICHAEL J. AS TO DEFENDANT BLOCKEY, JOHN E. CLIFDEN DEVELOPMENT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
LETTER FROM JOHN BLOCKLEY RE CLARIFICATION OF JUDGMENT-COPY SENT TO PLAINTIFF-FWD'D TO COMMISSIONER.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28092, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
PARTIES FAILED TO APPEAR ON 4/6/06,DUE APPARENTLY TO PROCEDURAL ERROR, & COURT CON'T THE MATTER SUA SPONTE. HOWEVER, NO PARTIES APPEARED ON CON'T DATE
COURT'S LETTER TO MR. BLOCKLEY REQUESTING ADDRESS INFORMATION FOR CLIFDEN DEVELOPMENT FILED AND MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
ORDER AMENDING JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC FILED.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-13-2005 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLOCKEY, JOHN E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURTIS, MICHAEL J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOCKEY, JOHN E. CLIFDEN DEVELOPMENT, LLC $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $81.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,081.50, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE 21 DAY REQUIREMENT FOR DISPOSITION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURTIS, MICHAEL J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOCKEY, JOHN E. CLIFDEN DEVELOPMENT, LLC $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $81.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,081.50, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE 21-DAY REQUIREMENT FOR DISPOSITION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO SUBSTITUTE CLIFDEN DEVELOPMENT LLC AS PARTY DEFENDANT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN PLACE AND INSTEAD OF JOHN E. BLOCKLEY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BLOCKEY, JOHN E.
